dossiers.title: Eval review for component:evals:portable-proof-beacons (portable_eval_candidate, candidate)
dossiers.summary: runtime evidence repeated with a bounded claim shape and now pressures portable-eval review

review_questions.prompt: Does the evidence stay bounded to the owning repo and decision surface?
review_questions.why: Recurrence should surface pressure without quietly widening ownership.

review_questions.prompt: Do the cited evidence refs justify the current status, or is the signal still early?
review_questions.why: Hints and candidates should not pretend to be a decision.

review_questions.prompt: Is the underlying claim portable and bounded enough for aoa-evals, or should it remain runtime-local evidence?
review_questions.why: A repeated artifact is not automatically a public proof surface.

review_questions.prompt: Do any phrases here overclaim what the evidence actually supports?
review_questions.why: Recurrence should tighten proof, not inflate it.

dossiers.title: Skill review for component:skills:bundle-and-activation-beacons (unused_skill_opportunity, watch)
dossiers.summary: description-trigger suite suggests a relevant skill should have appeared, but the receipt trail does not show it
recommended_actions: inspect the applicability map and defer notes

review_questions.prompt: Does the evidence stay bounded to the owning repo and decision surface?
review_questions.why: Recurrence should surface pressure without quietly widening ownership.

review_questions.prompt: Do the cited evidence refs justify the current status, or is the signal still early?
review_questions.why: Hints and candidates should not pretend to be a decision.

review_questions.prompt: Was a relevant skill omitted, deferred, or blocked by an explicit boundary?
review_questions.why: Usage-gap signals should distinguish genuine misses from intentional restraint.

review_questions.prompt: Do trigger descriptions and collision tests still match the intended activation boundary?
review_questions.why: Trigger drift often hides as routing intuition until the evals go stale.
